item.description: President Donald Trump said he only plans to make a good deal with Iran, or not make a deal at all, as Iranian state media released a draft of what they said was an alleged peace deal outline. NBC News’ Monica Alba reports that the White House called the released memorandum a “fabrication.”

media:content.media:title: Trump: Iran is ‘negotiating on fumes’ as deal remains unclear
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump said he only plans to make a good deal with Iran, or not make a deal at all, as Iranian state media released a draft of what they said was an alleged peace deal outline. NBC News’ Monica Alba reports that the White House called the released memorandum a “fabrication.”

item.title: Trump: Iran is ‘negotiating on fumes’ as deal remains unclear

item.dc:creator: Justin Goldman
Laura Strickler
item.description: President Donald Trump’s social posts left a trail of confusion over the weekend as Iran negotiations continue.

media:content.media:text: President Trump Hosts Law Enforcement Leaders Dinner In The Rose Garden
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump in the Rose Garden at the White House on May 11.

item.title: Deal or no deal? Trump’s social media posts add confusion to Iran conflict

item.description: Multiple workers are still missing after a chemical tank in Washington state imploded on Tuesday, killing at least one person. The now-destroyed chemical tank at a paper plant was holding nearly a million gallons of hazardous liquid before it ruptured. The cause of the accident remains unknown. NBC’s Morgan Chesky reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Chemical Tank Implodes in Washington State, Killing at Least 1
media:content.media:description: Multiple workers are still missing after a chemical tank in Washington state imploded on Tuesday, killing at least one person. The now-destroyed chemical tank at a paper plant was holding nearly a million gallons of hazardous liquid before it ruptured. The cause of the accident remains unknown. NBC’s Morgan Chesky reports for TODAY.

item.title: Chemical Tank Implodes in Washington State, Killing at Least 1

item.dc:creator: Henry J. Gomez
item.description: Vance spoke to NBC News in an interview that touched on Iran, Secretary of State Marco Rubio and the “anti-weaponization fund.”

media:content.media:text: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio, US Second Lady Usha Vance and US Vice President JD Vance attend an arrival ceremony for the British King and Queen on the South Lawn of the White House in Washington, DC, on April 28, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio, second lady Usha Vance and Vice President JD Vance on the South Lawn of the White House last month.

item.title: Vance opens up about his faith journey — and Usha’s central role

item.description: As cases continue to rise, a blood test has been added to the list of the American Cancer Society’s recommended screenings for colorectal cancer. It’s not meant to replace colonoscopies, but could help catch cancers when people might not get screened otherwise. NBC News' Erika Edwards reports on how effective the blood test is.

media:content.media:title: New blood test is added an an option for colorectal cancer screenings
media:content.media:description: As cases continue to rise, a blood test has been added to the list of the American Cancer Society’s recommended screenings for colorectal cancer. It’s not meant to replace colonoscopies, but could help catch cancers when people might not get screened otherwise. NBC News' Erika Edwards reports on how effective the blood test is.

item.title: New blood test is added an an option for colorectal cancer screenings

item.dc:creator: Tyler Kingkade
item.description: Randi Weingarten, president of the American Federation of Teachers, is backing a parent-led movement to restrict how much time elementary school students spend on laptops in class.

media:content.media:text: Starbucks Workers To Strike In 40 Cities, Targeting Red Cup Day
media:content.media:description: Randi Weingarten made her proposals in a speech titled "Devices Down, Eyes Up, Hands On.”

item.title: Teachers union president calls for limits on AI and screen time in schools

item.dc:creator: Tim Rohan
item.description: Last week, Gio Reyna and his wife, Chloe, were sitting in a parking lot, outside a smoothie shop in Connecticut, waiting to hear if he’d made Team USA’s World Cup roster.

media:content.media:text: United States World Cup Roster Reveal
media:content.media:description: Giovanni Reyna, player of United States, poses with his jersey during the United States World Cup roster reveal on May 26, 2026 in New York.

media:content.media:text: Mauricio Pochettino
media:content.media:description: The U.S. Men's National Team's (USMNT) poses during the announcement of the USMNT 2026 World Cup roster in New York, on Tuesday.

item.title: Four years after World Cup drama, Gio Reyna gets another shot with Team USA

item.dc:creator: Doha Madani
Pilar Melendez
item.description: Warning: This story includes spoilers for part one of the “Summer House” Season 10 reunion.

media:content.media:text: Kyle Cooke, Ciara Miller, Andy Cohen, Amanda Batula, West Wilson.
media:content.media:description: Kyle Cooke, Ciara Miller, Andy Cohen, Amanda Batula and West Wilson at the "Summer House" Season 10 reunion.

media:content.media:text: Ben Waddell, Bailey Taylor, Mia Calabrese, Lindsay Hubbard, Kyle Cooke, Ciara Miller, Andy Cohen, Amanda Batula, West Wilson, Carl Radke, Jesse Solomon, KJ Dillard and the "Summer House Reunion."
media:content.media:description: Kyle Cooke, Ciara Miller, Andy Cohen, Amanda Batula and West Wilson at the "Summer House" Season 10 reunion.

media:content.media:text: Amanda Batula, West Wilson.
media:content.media:description: Kyle Cooke, Ciara Miller, Andy Cohen, Amanda Batula and West Wilson at the "Summer House" Season 10 reunion.

item.title: Bravo’s messy ‘Summer House’ reunion becomes a can’t-miss event

item.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

media:content.media:title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
media:content.media:description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

item.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio

item.dc:creator: Jonathan Allen
item.description: AI is becoming a dominant political issue, with many on the right and the left coalescing around concerns about the rapid growth of the industry.

media:content.media:text: Governor Newsom speaks while pointing his finger upwards
media:content.media:description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom recently signed an executive order requiring state agencies to work with industry groups, academics and organized labor to develop plans for assessing and offsetting AI’s effects on workers in the state.

media:content.media:text: President Trump's Nominees For The Federal Trade Commission Testify Before The Senate Commerce Committee
media:content.media:description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom recently signed an executive order requiring state agencies to work with industry groups, academics and organized labor to develop plans for assessing and offsetting AI’s effects on workers in the state.

item.title: Gavin Newsom takes a populist turn on AI ahead of a possible 2028 presidential run

item.dc:creator: Daniel Arkin
item.description: CBS has reportedly declined to renew a contract with Sharyn Alfonsi, a “60 Minutes” journalist whose segment about an El Salvadoran prison was abruptly nixed.

media:content.media:text: 60 Minutes correspondent Sharyn Alfonsi at a conference in 2022.
media:content.media:description: "60 Minutes" correspondent Sharyn Alfonsi at a conference in 2022.

media:content.media:text: Bari Weiss
media:content.media:description: "60 Minutes" correspondent Sharyn Alfonsi at a conference in 2022.

item.title: ‘60 Minutes’ journalist says CBS contract ended after furor over delayed segment

item.dc:creator: Erika Angulo
Matt Lavietes
David K. Li
item.description: MIAMI — A federal judge on Wednesday declined to jail a Florida teenager accused of killing and sexually assaulting his stepsister, allowing him to remain in the custody of a family member while he awaits trial

media:content.media:text: Cruise Industry Helps Tourism To Be Back On Track In Portugal With Record Visits To The Country
media:content.media:description: A Carnival cruise ship.

media:content.media:text: Anna Kepner takes a selfie in a mirror
media:content.media:description: A Carnival cruise ship.

media:content.media:text: A white sedan, covered in mylar balloons and flower bouquets, at sunset.
media:content.media:description: A Carnival cruise ship.

item.title: Judge declines to jail teenager accused of killing stepsister aboard cruise ship

item.dc:creator: Minyvonne Burke
item.description: A South Carolina woman dining at a restaurant with her husband was killed Friday night after she was struck in the head and neck by a flying patio umbrella.

media:content.media:text: Driftwood Grill Home of the Lazy Gator in Summerton, S.C.
media:content.media:description: Driftwood Grill Home of the Lazy Gator in Summerton, S.C.

item.title: Woman killed by flying patio umbrella while dining at South Carolina restaurant

item.dc:creator: Tim Rohan
item.description: Last week, Gio Reyna and his wife, Chloe, were sitting in a parking lot, outside a smoothie shop in Connecticut, waiting to hear if he’d made Team USA’s World Cup roster.

media:content.media:text: United States World Cup Roster Reveal

item.title: Four years after World Cup drama, Gio Reyna gets another shot with Team USA

item.dc:creator: Steve Kopack
item.description: The Trump administration has refunded more than $20 billion in overpaid tariffs so far after the Supreme Court struck down the pillar of Trump’s trade policy.

media:content.media:text: Container Ships at the Port of Los Angeles
media:content.media:description: Container ships docked at the Port of Los Angeles on April 29.

item.title: $20 billion in tariff refunds have been paid so far, with more on the way

item.dc:creator: Minyvonne Burke
Joe Kottke
item.description: Minneapolis police chief Brian O’Hara, who took over the department in the wake of George Floyd’s death, resigned Tuesday after an investigation found that he had interfered with a probe into his conduct.

media:content.media:text: Shooting At Annunciation School Church In Minneapolis Leaves Multiple Children Dead And Many Injured
media:content.media:description: Minneapolis Police Chief Brian O'Hara, right, in Minneapolis in Aug. 2025.

item.title: Minneapolis police chief resigns after allegedly interfering with probe into his conduct

item.dc:creator: Tyler Kingkade
item.description: Randi Weingarten, president of the American Federation of Teachers, is backing a parent-led movement to restrict how much time elementary school students spend on laptops in class.

media:content.media:text: Starbucks Workers To Strike In 40 Cities, Targeting Red Cup Day
media:content.media:description: Randi Weingarten made her proposals in a speech titled "Devices Down, Eyes Up, Hands On.”

item.title: Teachers union president calls for limits on AI and screen time in schools

item.dc:creator: Alexander Smith
Nat Sumon
item.description: Five villagers stuck in a flooded cave in central Laos for more than a week were found alive, rescuers said Wednesday, but two others are missing.

media:content.media:text: Members of a rescue team work to save seven people trapped in a cave, at a location given as Xaisomboun Province
media:content.media:description: Members of a rescue team work to save seven people trapped in a cave, at a location given as Xaisomboun province, Laos, in this handout image released Monday.

item.title: 5 villagers stuck in a flooded cave for more than a week found alive in Laos, rescuers say

item.dc:creator: Erika Edwards
item.description: For the first time, a blood test has been added to the list of the American Cancer Society’s recommended screenings for colorectal cancer.

media:content.media:text: A box of Guardant Health's Shield, a blood collection kit for cancer screening.
media:content.media:description: Guardant Health's Shield, a blood collection kit for cancer screening.

media:content.media:text: A Cologuard lab kit is seen inside of a bathroom on a sink next to an open toilet
media:content.media:description: Cologuard, an at-home colon cancer screening test kit.

item.title: A blood test is now an option to screen for colorectal cancer. Here’s what to know.

item.dc:creator: Stella Kim
Jay Ganglani
item.description: A Chinese dissident who fled the country aboard an inflatable boat has been detained in South Korea, with rights groups calling for him to be granted asylum after three previous escape attempts saw him returned to China.

media:content.media:text: Dong Guangping.
media:content.media:description: Dong Guangping.

item.title: Dissident flees China by inflatable boat, hoping it’s 4th time lucky on escape attempts

item.dc:creator: Andrew Greif
item.description: The New York Knicks are back in the NBA Finals for the first time since 1999 — when star guard Jalen Brunson was 2 and hanging around his father Rick’s team.

media:content.media:text: Photo illustration of Jalen Brunson
Cleveland Cavaliers v New York Knicks - Game Two
New York Knicks v Atlanta Hawks - Game Three
1999 NBA Playoffs - Atlanta Hawks v New York Knicks - Game Three

item.title: Jalen Brunson was part of Knicks’ last NBA Finals team — as a toddler. Now he’s their star.

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Podiatrists say that Birkenstock Arizona sandals are some of the most comfortable shoes on the market thanks to the built-in arch support. Right now, get them for 40 percent off.

media:content.media:text: Birkenstock Arizona sandals have a contoured footbed with built-in arch support for comfort.
media:content.media:description: Birkenstock Arizona sandals have a contoured footbed with built-in arch support for comfort.

media:content.media:text: Birkenstock Arizona sandals have a contoured footbed with built-in arch support for comfort.
media:content.media:description: Birkenstock Arizona sandals have a contoured footbed with built-in arch support for comfort.

item.title: Deal of the Day: Birkenstock Arizona sandals are 40% off

item.dc:creator: Harry Rabinowitz
item.description: Shop the best Home Depot Memorial Day sales on tools, appliances, and gardening supplies from Dewalt, Miracle-Gro and LG.

media:content.media:text: Home Depot is a great retailer to shop over Memorial Day weekend if you are looking for tools, home improvement and appliances.

item.dc:creator: Cory Fernandez
Cory Fernandez
Bethany Heitman
item.description: I found the best methods and products for cleaning glasses, including reading glasses, sunglasses and more. Optometrists recommend the best cleaning products.

media:content.media:text: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.
media:content.media:description: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.

media:content.media:text: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.
media:content.media:description: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.

item.title: This is how you should actually be cleaning your glasses

item.dc:creator: Cory Fernandez
item.description: The Ninja Creami is one of the best ice cream makers, but are there better options? I tested it against KitchenAid, Cuisinart Fast Freeze and more to find out.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy of Cory Fernandez and Zoe Malin
media:content.media:text: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy of Cory Fernandez and Zoe Malin
media:content.media:text: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: The Ninja Creami on a granite table with the mixing paddle beside it.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: Cuisinart FastFreeze ice cream maker on a table.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: Light green KitchenAid Stand Mixer with ice cream maker attachment installed.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: The Cuisinart Ice Cream Maker
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: The GreenPan Frost sitting on a table with the lid beside it.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: The Nutribullet Chill Ice Cream Maker on a table.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

item.title: I tested the Ninja Creami against five popular competitors, and the results shocked me
